name: app-ui
description: Unity App UI framework — components, MVVM, navigation, Redux state management, and theming for UI Toolkit.

install.check: echo 'app-ui is a Unity package — no CLI to check'

test.command: echo 'app-ui skills are documentation-only — no runtime test needed'
